positive: A celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting gracefully among blooming cherry blossoms. The fox should have a flowing, ethereal tail, illuminated by soft moonlight. The composition should be highly stylized, using strong silhouette elements and vibrant contrast between deep indigo night tones and glowing pastel pinks/creams. Focus on clean lines, intricate details in the fur and blossoms, and a mystical, elegant aesthetic suitable for apparel art. Minimalism mixed with detailed nature elements. Vector art quality, high contrast, central focus.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, low quality, watermark, logo, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noise, jpeg artifacts, ugly, messy, amateur drawing, signature
